portfolio.tip: Shows the current value of your position in the ERC-4626 vault. Calculated as: your shares × share price. The share price increases as the vault generates fees.

invest.tip: Deposit USDC to receive vAI shares. The vault uses the funds to provide liquidity on Uniswap V3, generating trading fees that are shared proportionally with investors.

market.tip: Real-time market data from the ETH/USDC 0.05% pool on Uniswap V3. Source: The Graph subgraph or CoinGecko as fallback.

system.tip: Overall system status: on-chain vault, AI services, risk metrics and automated operations history.

price.label: Price
price.tip: Current spot price of ETH in USDC on the Uniswap V3 0.05% pool. Updated in real-time from on-chain data.

tick.label: Tick
tick.tip: Current tick in Uniswap V3's discrete price system. Each tick represents a 0.01% price increment (log₁.₀₀₀₁ of price). The current tick determines which liquidity ranges the price falls within.

twap.label: TWAP
twap.tip: Time-Weighted Average Price — a time-weighted average that is resistant to manipulation. Calculated from recent on-chain observations. Used as a safe price reference by the AI system.

liquidity.label: Liquidity
liquidity.tip: Total liquidity available in the pool around the current price. Higher value means less slippage for traders and more fees generated for liquidity providers.

volume24h.label: Volume 24h
volume24h.tip: Trading volume in the last 24 hours on the ETH/USDC 0.05% pool. High volume generates more fees for the vault. Data from The Graph (Uniswap V3 subgraph).

volatility1d.label: Volatility 1D
volatility1d.tip: 1-day realized volatility, calculated from hourly logarithmic returns of real OHLC data. The AI uses this value to determine the ideal liquidity range width.

atr.label: ATR
atr.tip: Average True Range — measures market volatility by the average price movement. Calculated as: price × 1D volatility. Used by the AI to calibrate rebalancing thresholds.

stdDev.label: Std Deviation
stdDev.tip: Standard deviation of price returns. High values indicate a more volatile market. The AI uses this value to adjust range widths and allocation between strategies (Core/Defensive/Opportunistic).

impermanentLoss.label: IL (Impermanent Loss)
impermanentLoss.tip: Estimated impermanent loss of the current position compared to simply holding the tokens. It is a temporary loss that occurs when the price moves away from the entry price. The AI tries to minimize IL through rebalancing.

maxDrawdown.label: Max Drawdown
maxDrawdown.tip: Largest percentage drop in vault value from the historical peak. A downside risk indicator. Lower value is better.

var95.label: VaR 95%
var95.tip: Value at Risk at 95% confidence — maximum expected loss under normal market conditions (5% probability of exceeding this value). Calculated based on current volatility.

sharpe.label: Sharpe Ratio
sharpe.tip: Risk-adjusted return. Calculated as (return - risk-free rate) / standard deviation. Sharpe > 1 is good, > 2 is excellent. Measures how much extra return you get per unit of risk.

sortino.label: Sortino Ratio
sortino.tip: Similar to Sharpe, but only penalizes downside volatility. More relevant for investors primarily concerned with losses. Sortino > 1 is good.

calmar.label: Calmar Ratio
calmar.tip: Annualized return divided by Max Drawdown. Measures return efficiency relative to the worst historical scenario. Calmar > 1 is considered good.

aiStrategy.card: LightGBM-powered AI model that analyzes real-time market data to generate optimal liquidity range parameters.
aiStrategy.volatility1d: 1-day realized volatility fed into the LightGBM model. Higher values widen the recommended range to reduce rebalancing frequency.
aiStrategy.volatility7d: 7-day realized volatility. Provides a longer horizon view to detect sustained trends and calibrate range recommendations.
aiStrategy.volumeScore: Normalized trading volume score (0–100%). High volume suggests more fee income potential, which may justify narrower, higher-concentration ranges.
aiStrategy.liquidityDepth: Pool liquidity depth around the current price. Low depth means higher price impact per trade, pushing the model toward more conservative range positioning.
aiStrategy.rangeWidth: AI-recommended percentage width (±) for the liquidity position. Wider in high-volatility periods, narrower when the market is calm.
aiStrategy.confidence: LightGBM model confidence in the current recommendation (0–100%). Higher confidence means stronger historical pattern support for the generated parameters.

rangeOptimizer.card: Distributes capital across three strategic ranges — Core (concentrated fees), Defensive (wide safety net), and Opportunistic (ultra-tight for maximum yield).
rangeOptimizer.core: Primary liquidity range (±6%). Holds ~60% of capital. Optimized for maximum fee capture during normal daily price movement.
rangeOptimizer.defensive: Wide safety range (±20%). Acts as a buffer during extreme volatility to ensure the vault continues earning fees even during sharp price swings.
rangeOptimizer.opportunistic: Ultra-tight range (±2%) around the current price. Maximizes fee yield during low-volatility periods. Small allocation to keep rebalancing costs manageable.

executionEngine.card: Manages on-chain Uniswap V3 positions — opens, rebalances, and collects fees automatically based on AI signals.
executionEngine.activePositions: Currently open Uniswap V3 liquidity positions. Green dot = in-range (actively earning fees). Red dot = out-of-range (price moved outside position bounds).
executionEngine.recentExecutions: Log of recent automated actions: rebalance operations, fee collections, and position adjustments executed by the keeper bot.
executionEngine.collectFees: Collect accumulated trading fees from this Uniswap V3 position. Collected fees are added to the vault and increase the vAI share price.
executionEngine.openPosition: Open a new Uniswap V3 liquidity position using the AI-calculated optimal range based on current market volatility and confidence.

vaultHistory.card: On-chain record of your deposits and withdrawals from the ERC-4626 vault, fetched directly from Arbitrum blockchain events.
vaultHistory.vaiShares: Vault shares (vAI) issued when depositing USDC. As the vault earns trading fees, the share price increases — the same number of shares becomes worth more USDC over time.
vaultHistory.blockNumber: Arbitrum block number when this transaction was confirmed on-chain. Click the external link icon to view the full transaction on the block explorer.

vaultManager.card: ERC-4626 tokenized vault on Arbitrum. Deposits are converted to vAI shares. The vault automatically provides liquidity on Uniswap V3, generating trading fees that increase the share price.
vaultManager.totalAssets: Total USDC value locked in the vault on-chain, including all active Uniswap V3 liquidity positions and any idle USDC buffer.
vaultManager.sharePrice: Current price of one vAI share in USDC. Starts at $1.00 and increases as the vault earns trading fees. Your profit = (current price - entry price) × shares held.
vaultManager.yourPosition: Your current position value in USDC, calculated as your vAI shares × current share price.
vaultManager.walletUsdc: Your USDC balance in the connected wallet, available to deposit into the vault.
vaultManager.deposit: Deposit USDC to receive vAI shares. Requires two wallet confirmations: first approve USDC spending, then confirm the deposit transaction.
vaultManager.withdraw: Redeem (burn) your vAI shares to receive back USDC at the current share price. No lock-up period.
vaultManager.fees: Management fee: charged annually on total assets. Performance fee: charged on profits above the high-water mark. Both fees accrue to the protocol treasury.

strategyController.card: Orchestrates the full automation cycle: data collection → AI inference → range optimization → on-chain execution. Runs automatically every 15 minutes via keeper bot.
strategyController.cycleInterval: How often the keeper bot automatically runs a full strategy cycle — fetching market data, running AI inference, and executing rebalances if needed.
strategyController.nextRun: Estimated time until the keeper bot starts the next automated strategy cycle.
strategyController.runCycle: Manually trigger a strategy cycle: fetches live market data from The Graph, runs LightGBM inference, and updates range parameters in real time.
strategyController.rebalance: Send an immediate rebalance signal to the keeper bot to execute on-chain position adjustments using the latest AI-calculated parameters.

riskDashboard.card: Monitors risk metrics and market regime — impermanent loss, drawdown, Sharpe ratio, VaR, and the rebalancing threshold score.
riskDashboard.marketRegime: Current market regime detected by the AI. Determines strategy posture: Trend (follow momentum), Range (mean-reversion fees), High-Vol (widen positions), Low-Vol (concentrate for yield).
riskDashboard.trend: Trend strength indicator (0–100%). High values indicate strong directional momentum, favoring wider ranges and directional positioning.
riskDashboard.vol: Current volatility level relative to historical average. High values trigger wider liquidity ranges and more defensive capital allocation.
riskDashboard.volume: Current trading volume relative to historical average. High volume indicates an active market with higher fee generation potential.
riskDashboard.rebalanceScore: Composite score measuring how far the current position is from optimal. When it exceeds the threshold (default 0.65), the keeper bot triggers an automatic rebalance.
